search.typeToSearch: Type to search for a destination

complete.title: You've reached your destination!
complete.tipSub: Add a tip to show appreciation

driverMatched.title: Driver matched
driverMatched.body: Alemayehu is on the way to pick you up. ETA about 4 minutes.

driverArrived.title: Your driver has arrived
driverArrived.body: Plate 3-AA-12345 is waiting at your pickup point.

tripStarted.title: Trip started
tripStarted.body: Enjoy your ride to Tana Lake. You can share trip status from the trip screen.

tripComplete.title: Trip completed
tripComplete.body: Thanks for riding with Bahiran Ride. Rate your trip and add a tip if you like.

promo.title: Weekend offer
promo.body: Get 15% off your next 3 rides in Bahir Dar. Valid through Sunday.

profile.name: Full Name
profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
profile.deleteReasonAsk: Please tell us why you want to delete your account (optional but helps us improve).
profile.deleteReasonRequired: Please provide a reason before deleting your account.
profile.chooseSource: How do you want to change your profile photo?

history.title: Ride History
history.noRidesSub: Your completed rides will appear here

termsModal.title: Terms & Conditions
termsModal.intro: Welcome to Bahiran Ride. By using our ride-hailing app, you agree to the following terms.
termsModal.serviceContent: Bahiran Ride provides ride-hailing services in Bahir Dar. We connect you with verified drivers for safe, affordable trips around the city.
termsModal.userContent: You must provide accurate pickup and destination details. You are responsible for your conduct during the trip. Payment is due upon completion of each ride.
termsModal.privacyContent: We collect your phone number and trip data to provide our service. We do not share your personal information with third parties without your consent.
termsModal.contactContent: For questions about these terms, reach us through the Support section in the app menu.
